title: albizia glaberrima
intro: Albizia glaberrima, also known as the smooth-leaved albizia or Chinese albizia, is a plant species native to China and Southeast Asia, characterized by its small, yellow flowers and smooth leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Albizia glaberrima include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and cardiovascular diseases. The plant is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine and can be prepared into various herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions.
